name: Customer Feedback Intake
description: Bring customer feedback from chat and email into one clear, investigation-ready thread.
whenToUse: Use this when you want to bring customer feedback from chat and email into one clear, investigation-ready thread.
Best for customer and operations teams that want repeatable work without changing the tools they already use.

stages.title: Capture Feedback
stages.summary: Read the inbound request and source refs, including media inventory and route hints.

stages.title: Establish main Thread
stages.summary: Reuse a Slack-origin thread or create one route-approved Slack handoff that preserves source context and media.

stages.title: Add Intake Reaction
stages.summary: Mark the main Slack message with a reaction that indicates support intake has started.

stages.title: Prepare Investigation Handoff
stages.summary: Return the refs and concise support context needed to start support.issue-investigation without re-discovering the source message.
